## Summary

Describe the release or setup task.

## Why

Why is this needed before or during public beta?

## Scope

- GitHub setup
- Discussions
- release packaging
- signing or notarization
- install docs
- screenshots or demo
- other

## Done when

- [ ] task is completed
- [ ] docs are updated if needed
- [ ] release impact is verified
